visitor_id.description: The `visitor_id` (a unique identifier) of the user's device. See the [Device Fingerprinting documentation](https://stytch.com/docs/fraud/guides/device-fingerprinting/fingerprints) for more details on the `visitor_id`.

ip_address.description: The IP address of the user's device.

ip_geo_city.description: The city where the IP address is located.

ip_geo_region.description: The region where the IP address is located.

ip_geo_country.description: The country code where the IP address is located.
